programme.title: Kabut Pelangi Waterfall: Indonesia
programme.desc: Traveling to East Java and experiencing a waterfall tucked deep in the lush forest.

programme.title: Bryce Canyon Relaxation
programme.desc: Admiring the wonders of one of the world's most breathtaking natural destinations: Bryce Canyon, in Utah.

programme.title: Underwater Wonders
programme.desc: Highlighting the abundant and varied flora and fauna that dwells underwater in several oceans around the world.

programme.title: Healing Hawaii: Kauai
programme.desc: A visual and audio journey around the exotic island paradise of Kauai, known as the Garden Isle. 60 different one-minute scenes of nature, slowly transitioning from one to the next.

programme.title: Santa Ynez Valley: California
programme.desc: Take a walk in the idyllic valley and enjoy calming sights of mature trees, and endless skies.

programme.title: Above the Dolomites
programme.desc: Featuring cinematography by new collaborator Ryan Shirley and synchronized to new healing music by Antonio Resende; offering some views that showcase the Dolomites mountain range.

programme.title: Tumpak Sewu Waterfalls: East Java
programme.desc: A close look at the edge of the tiered, plunging streams of Indonesia's Tumpak Sewu falls.

programme.title: Yosemite Magic: Yosemite National Park
programme.desc: Yosemite is known all over the world for its granite cliffs, waterfalls, and giant sequoias.

programme.title: Healing Hawaii II: Oahu
programme.desc: The wonders of Oahu.

programme.title: Bryce Canyon Relaxation
programme.desc: Admiring the wonders of one of the world's most breathtaking natural destinations: Bryce Canyon, in Utah.

programme.title: Waterfalls of the World 2
programme.desc: Places like Iguazu Falls in Argentina, Patagonia in Chile, Banff and Jasper in Alberta, McWay Falls and Hidden Falls in Big Sur, California, Columbia River Falls in Oregon, and more, paired with soothing ambient music by Relax Moods.

programme.title: Moraine Lake Relaxation
programme.desc: Moraine Lake in Banff National Park.

programme.title: Spring in Japan
programme.desc: Relaxing with the sights and sounds of spring in Japan's mountainous regions during spring cherry blossom bloom, paired with soothing piano music.

programme.title: Wenderholm & Scandretts Park: New Zealand
programme.desc: Scenery of scenic regional parks with their coastal forests and rocky bluffs that border spectacular ocean views.

programme.title: Lakeside Campfire
programme.desc: The beauty of a lakeside campfire.

programme.title: Wild Window
programme.desc: A look at the dazzling fish that inhabit the marine landscapes of the Tropical Pacific; exploring their daily lives as they forage and school in the depths of the ocean.

programme.title: Lombok Beaches: Indonesia
programme.desc: Experiencing the beaches of an Indonesian island set to a peaceful soundtrack.

programme.title: Tiny House by the Coast: Îles de la Madeleine
programme.desc: The filmmaker captures the beauty of a tiny lone house on Îles de la Madeleine, Quebec; the filmmaker illuminates the serenity and pristine environment of the region they belong to.

programme.title: A Day in Mt Rainier 1
programme.desc: Journeying to hidden sections of Mount Rainier National Park in Washington state with pure nature sounds for relaxation.

programme.title: Kusawa Lake: Southern Yukon
programme.desc: Take the dock to a fresh, glacier-fed alpine lake in majestic Yukon.

programme.title: Lombok Beaches: Indonesia
programme.desc: Experiencing the beaches of an Indonesian island set to a peaceful soundtrack.

programme.title: Broken Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: Exploring the caves and sea tunnels of a natural pool surrounded by cliffs and stunning views.

programme.title: Bulog Dos Island
programme.desc: Showcasing a small tropical island encircled by crystal-clear turquoise waters called Bulog Dos Island in the Philippines.

programme.title: Above & Under
programme.desc: Flying above beachy shores; diving deep into crystal-clear waters brimming with sea creatures.

programme.title: Kahakuloa Bay: Hawaii
programme.desc: Kahakuloa Bay: Hawaii

programme.title: Cadlao Lagoon: Philippines
programme.desc: Experiencing the beauty of a turquoise lagoon flanked by impressive, vegetation-covered, mountains.

programme.title: Above & Below the Caribbean
programme.desc: A static scene of Curacao, Caribbean; featuring swimming fish, passing clouds, and sunshine glistening; filmed by Tilo and Yvonne Kühnast.

programme.title: Islands of Paradise
programme.desc: The beautiful Yasawa islands of Fiji.

programme.title: Wonders of New Zealand
programme.desc: A 4K UHD ambient nature film which showcases the beauty of New Zealand's South Island with ambient real-life nature sounds.

programme.title: Above the Fiji Islands
programme.desc: Featuring aerial views of remote South Pacific islands, accompanied by nature sounds and ambient music by Relax Moods; offering a mix of ground-level and bird's-eye perspectives through smooth, continuous shots, concluding with a real-time sunset over the sea.

programme.title: Forest and Mountains, Alaska
programme.desc: A trip to the wilderness in Alaska's thick underbrush, with nothing but trees and snow-capped mountains as a guide.

programme.title: Senaru Waterfalls: Indonesia
programme.desc: Discovering the beauty of waterfalls cascading from a sheer cliff, nestled in lush vegetation.

programme.title: Hollyford Track: New Zealand
programme.desc: A remote beech forest full of diverse vegetation, waterfalls and rocky streams.

programme.title: Chemin Pealey: Îles de la Madeleine
programme.desc: Admiring the tranquility of water.

programme.title: Golden Waves Crashing at Sunset
programme.desc: The shores of the iconic Baker Beach in San Francisco with a sunset scene filmed in high definition. Views of the Marin headlands and the Golden Gate bridge.

programme.title: Mountains of Majesty
programme.desc: Sights and sounds of the Rocky Mountains in Banff and Jasper in Alberta, Yoho National Park in British Columbia and Glacier National Park, Mont.; featuring raging waterfalls, clear mountain lakes, snowy mountains, wildflowers and abundant wildlife.

programme.title: Tropical Rain Relaxation
programme.desc: Sights and stereo sounds of tropical rain in Taveuni Island, Fiji, known as the Garden Island; the storm slowly intensifies to serve as a meditation or sleep aid.

programme.title: Soothing Relaxation
programme.desc: Viewers are oohed and aahed by stunning scenery from California (Big Sur, Yosemite), Hawaii, Utah, Argentina, Mexico, Tahiti, Oregon, and more.

programme.title: Nature Relaxation Journey Part 3
programme.desc: A colorful journey of dazzling different 5-10 minute sequences from places like Fiji, New Zealand, Patagonia, Everest, Hawaii, Canada, California, Oregon and more; an immensely relaxing and inspiring journey into the depths and wonders of nature.

programme.title: Beneath the Sea
programme.desc: A look at a compilation of spectacular underwater images from around the world.

programme.title: Lost in Paradise
programme.desc: A tropical island paradise to relax in. A one hour long high definition nature experience of two different remote islands hidden in the south Pacific.

programme.title: The Cliff: Costa Rica
programme.desc: Turquoise waters and blue skies as far as the eye can see viewed from atop a cliff.

programme.title: Bryce Canyon Relaxation
programme.desc: Admiring the wonders of one of the world's most breathtaking natural destinations: Bryce Canyon, in Utah.

programme.title: Peaceful Lake Views: Washington
programme.desc: Admire wildflowers as you dip your toes in the waters of Spirit Lake in the shadow of the Mount St. Helens volcano.

programme.title: Muriwai Beach: New Zealand
programme.desc: The coast of Muriwai Beach with tides and rushing currents.

programme.title: Beachside Hut: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: Golden sand, crystal-clear waters, infinite blue sky, and a charming hut on the Dominican Republic's Playa Coson.

programme.title: A Day in Paradise
programme.desc: A graciously flowing four hours long pure nature relaxation experience; immerse viewers in the sights and sounds of one of the world's pure and picturesque tropical islands -- for an entire day from sunrise to sunset.

programme.title: America From Above
programme.desc: Part one of a new series of ambient drone films for relaxation, America From Above is a spectacular yet ultra-soothing 1-hour long natural journey that sweeps viewers gently above America's vistas. You'll begin the farmlands of Iowa, soaring west through the Rocky Mountains of Colorado, then on to Utah's iconic red rock landscapes and finally ending on the West Coast with a familiar voyage over Big Sur and then back to San Diego just in time for sunset.

programme.title: Journey Around the World
programme.desc: There is no better way to relax and unwind than traveling to the world's most breathtaking and remote locations.

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature EP8
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Memoirs 11 May
programme.desc: Memoirs 11 May

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: Traditional and modern flavors combined with sheftalia, the classic Cypriot sausage made with chicken mince, paired with a refreshing lemon cheesecake mousse for dessert. A delicious blend of savory heritage and sweet indulgence that celebrates Mediterranean cuisine.

programme.title: Med Nations 02 Greece
programme.desc: Greece has a culture that has been shaped by hundreds of years of ideas, traditions, and life on the sea. From the ancient wonders of Athens to the sun-drenched islands of the Aegean, Greece shows this. This trip shows how Greece still inspires the Mediterranean and the world through its food, music, and long history.

programme.title: Sinj
programme.desc: Sinj blends courage, tradition, and warm hospitality—reflected even in its food. Edo Crljen welcomed us with a bold serving of tripes, while Ankica Vlastelica prepared the town’s pride: arambaši, Sinj’s iconic stuffed cabbage rolls you simply can’t leave without tasting.

programme.title: Med Minds 01 Caravaggio
programme.desc: Caravaggio, the rebellious Mediterranean painter, lived fiercely and left a legacy as bold as his character.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Whats On Special and Unique Festivals
programme.desc: From Malta to Morocco, unique festivals capture Mediterranean creativity. Malta hosts the Valletta Green Festival, Notte Bianca, Malta Air Show, and Gharb International Kite and Wind Festival. Portugal celebrates with Festa das Cruzes, Morocco Dream City Festival dazzles with arts and music, Croatia brings the avant garde MoDem Festival, and Italy hosts the historic Venice Debutante Grand Ball. These festivals showcase the extraordinary, the festive, and the unforgettable.

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Slovenia, a small nation of just two million people, is one of Europe’s most surprising delights. Nestled at the crossroads of the Germanic, Mediterranean, and Slavic worlds, it offers a charm all its own.

programme.title: Med Nations 06 Spain
programme.desc: Explore Spain, a country where sun-drenched beaches converge with vibrant cities steeped in centuries of history. From the artistic avenues of Barcelona to the lively Mediterranean ports, Spain presents a dynamic blend of culture, cuisine, and coastal traditions that embody its distinctive Mediterranean spirit.

programme.title: MED Destination ANTIPAROS
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Malini Angelica Palermo
programme.desc: Malini Angelica returns to Sicily to explore Palermo, Mondello, and Agrigento. From Palermo’s vibrant markets and rich history to Mondello’s seaside charm and the ancient Greek temples of Agrigento, she uncovers the island’s unique mix of cultures, cuisine, and character that make Sicily truly one of a kind.

programme.title: Bronzi di Riace il tesoro ritrovato
programme.desc: Calabria, a land steeped in myths, reveals its secrets through the Riace Bronzes. Restorer Cosimo Schepis shares the story of these ancient treasures, 50 years after their discovery. Actress Swamy Rotolo and her sister Grecia journey through Calabria, uncovering its hidden gems. A captivating exploration of the myths and legacy of Magna Grecia.

programme.title: Egypt Yesterday and Today
programme.desc: In this hour-long special, Rick Steves explores the historic and cultural wonders of Egypt, from Cairo and Alexandria to Luxor and Abu Simbel.

programme.title: Greek Myths: Oedipus
programme.desc: Greek Myths: Oedipus

programme.title: Opera - Salome
programme.desc: The 87th Festival of the Maggio Musicale Fiorentino opens with Richard Strauss's Salome, conducted by Alexander Soddy. Directed by Emma Dante, this new production features Lidia Fridman as Salome, Anna Maria Chiuri as Herodias, and Nikolai Schukoff as Herodes. The performance blends Strauss's intense musical drama with a fresh and dynamic staging.

programme.title: Concerto - OSN Fabio Luisi e Alexander Gadjiev Torino 2022
programme.desc: On April 28, 2022, esteemed conductor Fabio Luisi and acclaimed pianist Alexander Gadjiev took the stage at the Auditorium Rai "Arturo Toscanini" in Turin, accompanied by the Orchestra Sinfonica Nazionale della Rai. Gadjiev delivered a masterful performance of Chopin’s Piano Concerto No. 2, while Luisi led a captivating interpretation of Strauss’ "Aus Italien".

programme.title: Med Nations 01 Italy
programme.desc: The heart of Italy! A place where old empires, the brilliance of the Renaissance, and modern passion all come together. Italy shows itself through its traditions, flavours, and lively way of life. From the timeless beauty of Rome to the artistic heart of Florence and the vibrant energy of Naples, Italy is alive with life. It's a journey through a country that has had a profound impact on art, cuisine, and culture throughout the Mediterranean and beyond.

programme.title: Med Minds 02 Napoleon
programme.desc: Napoleon, the ambitious Corsican who rose to power, reshaped nations with his relentless drive and vision.

programme.title: La linea de la memoria
programme.desc: Rafael works in the port of Cádiz. He is a ship captain who spent many years sailing. His father was a historian and together they wrote a great book on the history of the port of Cádiz. Miguel is Rafael's friend since childhood. He is a big fan of sailing and travel around the world twice. The two protagonists are determined that the city of Cádiz recovers its glorious historical memory. Especially, the part concerning one of the most interesting episodes related to the Sea: the history of the Meridian of Cádiz (“zero Meridian”), valid for one hundred years in the eighteenth century for all the navigators of the world. Throughout the documentary, we know Rafael and Miguel and also their activities aimed at enhancing the history of the city. Finally, a group of students, in a very eye-catching action, “draw” with a red cloth the ancient meridian on the streets, squares and roofs of the city.

programme.title: Jesenice
programme.desc: In the hillside village of Staro Selo Jesenice, with views of the central Dalmatian islands, we found stone houses, a bocce court, and a traditional tavern run by Ante Bajso. There, he treated us to a Dalmatian classic—meat slow-cooked under a bell-shaped lid, peka.

programme.desc: Step into the fairytale beauty of Lake Bled, Slovenia, on Med Destinations. Crystal-clear waters, a picturesque island church, and lush Alpine surroundings make it a serene Mediterranean escape.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Napoli
programme.desc: Malini Angelica visits Naples, in Italy’s vibrant Campania region. She dives into the city’s beautiful chaos to uncover the heart of Neapolitan culture, sampling delicious street food, meeting friendly locals, and exploring its rich history. With its authenticity and energy, Naples stands out as one of Italy’s most captivating cities.

programme.title: Med Nations 04 France
programme.desc: France, where the sun shines on the Mediterranean, and there is a lot of culture and style. Along the beautiful French Riviera, from Nice to Marseille, France shows off a lively mix of history, food, and coastal life that has shaped the Mediterranean's spirit.

programme.title: Kaštela (U masliniku)
programme.desc: In Kaštela, a cluster of seven towns near Split, winemaking runs deep. Among olive groves and vineyards, Mladen Kuzmanić treated us to local flavors—sipa i bob, pancetta, goat cheese, and homemade sausage—perfectly paired with a glass of regional wine.

programme.title: Med Minds 02 Napoleon
programme.desc: Napoleon, the ambitious Corsican who rose to power, reshaped nations with his relentless drive and vision.

programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: We'll explore flamboyant Sevilla, where orange trees ring lacy palaces, bullfighting is still a cultural event, and little girls dream of growing up to become flamenco dancers.

programme.title: Med Nations 04 France
programme.desc: France, where the sun shines on the Mediterranean, and there is a lot of culture and style. Along the beautiful French Riviera, from Nice to Marseille, France shows off a lively mix of history, food, and coastal life that has shaped the Mediterranean's spirit.

programme.title: MED Destination ANTIPAROS
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Malini Angelica Rome
programme.desc: Malini Angelica explores Rome, Italy — a city of ancient ruins, grand monuments, and unforgettable food. She experiences daily Roman life, from enjoying cappuccino and cornetto at a local café to tasting classic pastas like cacio e pepe and pasta alla gricia. She visits local markets, enjoys a picnic at Villa Doria Pamphili, and discovers Rome’s iconic landmarks — the Spanish Steps, Trevi Fountain, and Pantheon — beautifully lit at night.

programme.title: La Firenze dei Medici
programme.desc: Explore the profound influence of the Medici family on the history of Florence, highlighting their rule from the 15th to the 16th century. The focus is on Lorenzo Il Magnifico, the era's most renowned figure. Through his life, we delve into iconic works linked to the Medici, including the masterpiece of architecture, the Dome of Santa Maria del Fiore, designed by Filippo Brunelleschi. The episode also features Florence’s own Sergio Staino, a celebrated designer and cartoonist, offering a unique perspective on the city’s rich cultural legacy.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: We'll explore flamboyant Sevilla, where orange trees ring lacy palaces, bullfighting is still a cultural event, and little girls dream of growing up to become flamenco dancers.

programme.title: The Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: The tale of Tartarus: The Damned of the Earth descends into the deepest abyss of the Greek underworld, where the most cursed souls are imprisoned. Here dwell legendary figures punished for defying the gods, bound by eternal torment. This dark realm serves as a chilling reminder of divine justice and the price of hubris. A myth that explores punishment, morality, and the shadow side of eternity.

programme.title: Madame Butterfly Teatro Alla Scala 2016
programme.desc: In Madama Butterfly (Teatro alla Scala, 2016), a young Japanese woman enters into a marriage with an American naval officer, filled with hope for a new life. As time passes, the contrast between her expectations and reality becomes more profound. The opera unfolds with deep emotional intensity, leading to a powerful and poignant conclusion.

programme.title: Concerto per Milano 2022
programme.desc: The Filarmonica della Scala and principal conductor Riccardo Chailly return to Piazza Duomo for the evocative Concerto per Milano. A landmark cultural event, this open-air performance brings world-class music to the heart of the city. Television direction by Stefania Grimaldi captures the grandeur and emotion of the evening.

Discover how Mediterranean rhythms echo across genres, generations, and cultures.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Barcelona
programme.desc: Barcelona, Spain, is a city close to Malini's heart. Returning after her student years, she retraces old steps to see how the city has changed. Barcelona, one of Europe’s most visited cities, still holds centuries-old charm. Malina's old haunts include El Gòtic, Sant Antoni, Passeig de Gràcia, and Barceloneta. visits Gaudí’s iconic Casa La Pedrera, and discovers the new wave of creative tapas restaurants in El Raval, a once run-down quarter now bursting with energy.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: We explore the dramatic castles, prehistoric cave paintings, and prized cuisine of the Dordogne River Valley, with its unforgettable blend of man-made and natural beauty.

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature EP8
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Brač (Supetar)
programme.desc: On Brač, famed for its white stone, Zlatni Rat beach, and Vidova Gora, we stopped in Supetar to taste tradition. Restaurateur Teo Dragičević served us šporka juha, mišanca, and vitalac—authentic island flavors rooted in Brač’s rich culinary heritage.

programme.title: Whats On Music Festivals All Over the Med
programme.desc: The Mediterranean comes alive to the sound of music. From Malta high energy Rock the South and sophisticated Malta Jazz Festival, to Italy cutting edge Limbo Festival, Spain forward thinking Sonar Festival, and Turkey classical and contemporary Istanbul Music Festival, every corner of the region vibrates with rhythm, passion, and creativity.

programme.title: Med Minds 03 Cleopatra

programme.title: Dates that made History
programme.desc: 399 BC: The Trial of Socrates dramatises the famous trial of the Greek philosopher Socrates, who is charged with corrupting the youth and impiety. The episode delves into Socrates' defence, his philosophical ideas, and his unwavering commitment to his principles. It explores the tension between individual thought and the societal norms of ancient Athens. Through this trial, the show examines the impact of Socrates' ideas on Western philosophy and his legacy.

programme.title: MED Destination VENICE
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Slovenia, a small nation of just two million people, is one of Europe’s most surprising delights. Nestled at the crossroads of the Germanic, Mediterranean, and Slavic worlds, it offers a charm all its own.

programme.title: Whats On Conferences, Startups and Innovation
programme.desc: A new world is being built right now across the Mediterranean, and we are taking you behind the scenes of the most important meetings of the year. This week, we are at the historic Mediterranean Conference Centre in Valletta for MedTech World, where the conversation has shifted from simple gadgets to responsible AI that doctors and patients can actually trust. We then head south to the incredible energy of AfricaIgnite to meet the founders of high-growth startups in climate tech and finance who are proving that Africa is the new engine of global innovation. Back on the islands, we explore the Startup Malta Festival to see how a pro-business ecosystem is helping entrepreneurs scale their boldest ideas across Europe. Finally, we join the global dialogue at the Finance Malta Conference to see how a focus on quality over quantity is redefining the future of investment and sustainability. This is a journey through the ideas and the people who are turning today's challenges into the success stories of the future.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Menorca
programme.desc: Malini Angelica explores Menorca, from Mahon’s markets and history to Ciutadella’s gothic charm and northern beaches. In Es Migjorn Gran, she hikes to ancient caves, visits Binigaus beach, and also learns to make Mahon style cheese.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: Alex starts his Vancouver exploration by visiting Bridges restaurant where he tries smoked salmon pizza with some seafood. Then he visits the Richmond Night Market and then Treasure Cafe. Later visits the Steel Toad Brewery in Olympic Village. Next he explores the Gastown, including the steam clock. Further he explores the Hills Native Art ending with Vancouver observation deck. Next he rides on board the Grouse Mountain Skyride, ending with Capilano Suspension Bridge park.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: From swimming in the ocean to relishing a traditional Maldivian lobster curry, Kim experiences the true meaning of joie de vivre at Reethi Rah.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: Alex is in Vancouver Island and calls for Saffron salmon at Modern Cafe. Next he visits “Red fish blue fish” a fish and chip shop and tries freshly prepared seafood. Further explores the Parksville beach for its sand sculptures and then explores a 50 year old Symphony Winery. Further Alex visits “Eagle wing whale watching” for fun and knowledge about the ocean life. To add to the adventure rush he tries motocross and then snorkels in cold waters of Nanaimo.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s adventures in Perth kick off with him immersing himself in the historic grandeur of the Scone Castle, where a mysterious stone tells tales of Scottish monarchs. But the real thunder of the Highlands awaits at the Braemar Games gathering, where tartan meets brawn, and Robbie learns that embracing his Scottish side involves more than just kilts and castles.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Novi Sad, the financial and industrial hub of Serbia.Starting with canoeing on Danube and later exploring the city and its landmarks.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Santa Village at Rovaniemi, where she reads some of the letters that children from around the world write to him.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: Luxurious hotels, thrilling water parks, inexpensive food and almost 300 days of bright sunny weather make Bulgaria’s biggest seaside resort, Sunny Beach popular for budget beach getaways. Catriona, however, stumbles onto the historic town of Nessebar, which is over 3000 years old, and realizes that there is more to the place than meets the eye. She goes on to visit the Castra Rubra winery, where she finds out about the history of Viticulture in Bulgaria and the process of wine making.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: Benafsha embarks on a whirlwind adventure in Ahmedabad. With just 48 hours in the city, she is determined to make the most of it, but how?

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: From exploring a vintage car museum to scaling a 5 meter ice-wall and sampling a rich bread cookie, Watch Alex exploring The Hague, also known as the “International city of peace”.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: A modern European oil city built on the back of a rich maritime heritage, Aberdeen is the energetic kingpin of northeast Scotland. While the boom times may come and go, the dynamic coastal metropolis never ceases to thrill with its free museums, outdoor adventures and natural attractions right on the city’s doorstep.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Požarevac and visits the ancient town of Viminacium. Later visits National Museum, concluding with Majdanpek’s Rajkova Pecina Caves.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Rovaniemi, where she visits a husky farm and finds out about about breeding and raising huskies.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: For the people of Sofia, preserving its heritage is sacrosanct, and this can be seen in the way the city's infrastructure is built around its archeological treasures. Catriona realizes this when she roams around the cobblestone streets of the city. With every monument she visits, she finds herself transported to a different era, right from Perperikon fort, which narrate stories of the Byzantine empire, to Boyana church, which is home to some of the earliest examples of medieval artwork.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: From lazing in hammocks by the beach to sipping drinks on a private yacht, Kim realizes that Maldives is the perfect destination to unwind in style.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: From trying dishes like Stroopwafel and Palat Stoofvlees to visiting the Erasmus bridge, cube houses and wall painting on the streets, Alex explores Rotterdam.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Since medieval times Aberdeenshire and its northwestern neighbour Moray have been the richest and most fertile regions of the Highlands. Aberdeenshire is famed for its Aberdeen Angus beef cattle, its many fine castles and the prosperous 'granite city' of Aberdeen.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Explore Majdanpek with our host as the city brings the viewers closer to the treasures strewn across the Serbian countryside.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Levi is Finland's largest and fastest-growing ski destination. Emeline is here, to find out the exciting activities that Levi offers, in summer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: With snow-capped peaks rising over primeval forests and traditional villages, Paro is like an Oriental Switzerland. On a visit to Paro, Radhika explores famous monasteries such as the Rinpung Dzong and Takstang Monastery, and learns the history and legends associated with them. Along the way, she finds out the secrets to the quintessential Bhutanese peace and contentment.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: An invigorating spa treatment, a cooking lesson, a snorkeling session – Kim has experiences in the Maldives that leave her completely rejuvenated.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: From trying Orange zest beer and traditional Dutch dishes to exploring St.Martin's Cathedral, Dom Tower and enjoying go karting and stand up paddle boat ride, watch Alex enjoy his trip in Utrecht.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: In the enchanting landscapes of Inverness, Robbie’s journey takes a whimsical turn: from eccentric to downright magical.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Nis,one of the oldest cities in Europe.She visits a concentration camp and later paraglides to end by watching a musical performance.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Emeline goes to Ruka-Kuusamo, where she tries river rafting. She also meets a reindeer herder,who tells her about the unique ways of herding reindeer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Actress and travel enthusiast, Radhika Bangia explores the enigma that is Bhutan, when she visits Thimpu, the capital city with no traffic lights and no skyscrapers invading the skyline. Here, she checks out significant sights such as the Tibetan-style National Memorial Chorten, the National Library and the Folk Heritage Museum in order to understand more about the beliefs, history, architecture and cuisine of Bhutan.

programme.title: World Heritage
programme.desc: Explore the ancient heritage sites of Abu Simbel, the Philae complex of Nubia and the Hatshepsut Temple to unravel the mystical stories behind the ancient temples of Egypt.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: Alex tries traditional Dutch food in Leiden, learns about Dutch history at Prinsenhof Museum, visits a Gothic church, a local cheese market and Delftware factory at Gouda.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: The grand finale of Robbie’s wild homecoming unfolds amidst the rugged beauty of the Isle of Skye.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Continue exploring Serbia with Heather as she visits the Manasija monastery, Resavska caves, ending with a joyride onboard Eight of Sargan rail line.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.desc: Krisann and Nathan’s vacation in Mauritius begins in Le Morne, where an unexpected adventure awaits the latter.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Known as Druk Yul or the “Land of the Thunder Dragon”, Bhutan is the country of mountains, monasteries and mystery. Radhika Bangia finds this to be true when she visits Punakha, the former capital of Bhutan, where she marvels at the architecture of Punakha Dzong and gets to know the story behind the two rivers, Mo Chhu and Po Chhu. She also explores the sacred temples and Mebar Tsho lake of Bumthang, the religious heart of Bhutan, and gets to know the local legends.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries out spa treatments, which are inspired by the Dead Sea and the desert surroundings at Hotel Kempinski Ishtar in Jordan.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: After Burj Khalifa, Alex has a traditional Emirati platter, visits the gold market and skiing rink, and goes for a camel safari and camping.

programme.title: City break
programme.desc: Nestled in the mighty Alps, tour the Austrian city of Innsbruck with Sabrina and explore a town that’s alpine-urban yet traditional in nature.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: In her final leg of journey, Heather visits the Uvac canyon, tries locally prepared pie, ending with Kopaonik National Park and Jelovarnik waterfalls.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.desc: On an island-hopping adventure in Mauritius, Krisann and Nathan find out that time works differently on these islands.

programme.title: XP Guide
programme.desc: A homely place where the aroma of freshly baked bread greets you as people smoothly glide along on their bicycles. Welcome to Copenhagen.

programme.title: Unwind
programme.desc: Indeya explores the Cinnamon plantations, tries a local dish and witnesses a traditional dance performance.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: Alex has varied experiences in Dubai like trying Lebanese cheese bread, visiting a coffee museum, going to IMG Worlds of Adventure and more.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: In Amsterdam, Alex tries Bitterballen, cannabis cake and visits Heineken Experience brewery. He explores Zaanse Schans village with windmills and Coster Diamonds, the oldest diamond polishing factory.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: Like Rome, Plovdiv straddles seven hills; but as Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited city, it’s far more ancient. As Catriona takes a tour of the city to see its iconic attractions such as a Roman Amphitheatre, which was once the setting for gladiator fights, and the striking Baroque Saints Constantine and Helena Church, she begins to see how seamlessly modern life blends with the age-old ruins. Along the way, she realizes why Plovdiv is called the ‘Eternal City’ of Bulgaria.

programme.title: XP Guide
programme.desc: Stockholm, the capital and largest city of Sweden, was built on 14 Islands. This place is also sometimes referred as Venice of the north.

programme.desc: This exhilarating city of castles, beer and segway rides can take you on a break that will truly leave you catching your breath.

programme.desc: Emeline goes to Ruka-Kuusamo, where she tries river rafting. She also meets a reindeer herder,who tells her about the unique ways of herding reindeer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Actress and travel enthusiast, Radhika Bangia explores the enigma that is Bhutan, when she visits Thimpu, the capital city with no traffic lights and no skyscrapers invading the skyline. Here, she checks out significant sights such as the Tibetan-style National Memorial Chorten, the National Library and the Folk Heritage Museum in order to understand more about the beliefs, history, architecture and cuisine of Bhutan.

programme.title: World Heritage
programme.desc: Explore the ancient heritage sites of Abu Simbel, the Philae complex of Nubia and the Hatshepsut Temple to unravel the mystical stories behind the ancient temples of Egypt.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: Alex tries traditional Dutch food in Leiden, learns about Dutch history at Prinsenhof Museum, visits a Gothic church, a local cheese market and Delftware factory at Gouda.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: The grand finale of Robbie’s wild homecoming unfolds amidst the rugged beauty of the Isle of Skye.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Continue exploring Serbia with Heather as she visits the Manasija monastery, Resavska caves, ending with a joyride onboard Eight of Sargan rail line.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.desc: Krisann and Nathan’s vacation in Mauritius begins in Le Morne, where an unexpected adventure awaits the latter.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Known as Druk Yul or the “Land of the Thunder Dragon”, Bhutan is the country of mountains, monasteries and mystery. Radhika Bangia finds this to be true when she visits Punakha, the former capital of Bhutan, where she marvels at the architecture of Punakha Dzong and gets to know the story behind the two rivers, Mo Chhu and Po Chhu. She also explores the sacred temples and Mebar Tsho lake of Bumthang, the religious heart of Bhutan, and gets to know the local legends.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries out spa treatments, which are inspired by the Dead Sea and the desert surroundings at Hotel Kempinski Ishtar in Jordan.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: After Burj Khalifa, Alex has a traditional Emirati platter, visits the gold market and skiing rink, and goes for a camel safari and camping.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova in Florida ospite di un eccezionale evento organizzato da Ursula Avella Presidente di "Great Culinary Minds". L 'evento si è svolto al ristorante "Valentino Cucina Italiana". Ospite di Ornella è il talentuoso chef Mauro Uliassi, all'epoca 2 stelle Michelin, ora 3. Ospite d'eccezione di questa puntata il cantautore Raf che incontra Ornella su una spiaggia di Miami. (2015)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova a Brooklyn e visita il ristorante di Joe e chef Marco Chirico per preparare alcune specialità del ristorante. Prima di andare in cucina, Chef Marco preprare alcuni cocktail creati da lui, immaginate che chef Marco prepara i suoi liquori, come il limoncello e il mandarincello. La Happy hours al ristorante di Marco Polo è una combinazione di delizie tipiche italiane, formaggi e salumi ed una presentazione di frutti di mare, ostriche e gamberi.(2015)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado prosegue il suo viaggio culinario nel ristorante Enoteca, il ristorante si trova affianco a Marco Polo. Enoteca è il regno di Chef Marco Chirico, ed e` propio ad Enoteca che chef Marco prepara piatti sempre più originali come il Vulcano Pizza e il Cannolo Pizza (2015)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita il ristorante "Il Tartufo" a Manayunk, poco distante da Filadelfia, dove incontra Al Del Bello, per preparare alcune ricette tipiche del ristorante. In questa puntata Ornella indossa i guanti da boxer per correre come Rocky Balboa sulla scalinata del museo d'arte di Filadelfia. (2007)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita Al Del Bello al suo ristorante "Il Portico", uno dei ristoranti più raffinati di Filadelfia. Al racconta la sua storia di gratidudine nei confronti della famiglia Lattanzi proprietari di ristoratori italiani a New York. (2006)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado incontra chef Rocco Sacramone al ristorante Trattoria "l'Incontro", Chef Rocco, condivide alcune delle ricette più amate dai suoi clienti incluso una dolcissima pizza alla nutella. (2008)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado incontra un vero gentiluomo della ristorazione italiana a Filadelfia, Giuseppe Giuliani, patron de "La Buca". Giuseppe oltre a preparare alcune ricette toscane, racconta l'avventura dell'apertura atipica e fuori programma del ristorante per ospitare il Maestro Luciano Pavarotti in tour a Filadelfia.(2006)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: In questa puntata, Ornella Fado conduce un favoloso evento dedicato alla Regione Calabria da Eataly Downtown, preparando ricette insieme allo chef calabrese Luca Caligiuro e allo chef italo-americano Ryan Rizzuto.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Ornella Fado è a Milano, all'EXPO, con i giovani della Basilicata del progetto Sano è Lucano. I prodotti tipici lucani ispirano una serie di incontri culinari: dalla barca alla Mondadori, fino a Lady Bu Bistrò e al ristorante stellato Il Luogo di Aimo e Nadia con lo chef Fabio Pisani.Il racconto è arricchito dagli interventi di Sara Farnetti e Pietro Bitonti.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: In questa puntata, Ornella Fado conduce un favoloso evento dedicato alla Regione Calabria da Eataly Downtown, preparando ricette insieme allo chef calabrese Luca Caligiuro e allo chef italo-americano Ryan Rizzuto.

programme.title: Eccellenze Italiane con Piero Muscari intervista a Heinz Beck
programme.desc: Piero Muscari intervista Cesare Berlingeri, noto artista contemporaneo italiano. Cesare illustra l'importanza della sua arte e cosa vuole esprimere con la tecnica dei quadri piegati.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita cinque amici ristoratori durante le feste Natalizie, prima tappa" Angelina's" a Staten Island, poi e` la volta di "Marco Polo" e "Luzzo" a Brooklyn. A Manhattan nell'Upper East side, Ornella visita "83 e mezza". Ultima tappa per ujn buon gelato,"Dolce Gelateria" nel Village. (2013)

programme.title: Il CIRCOLO DEL BUONGUSTAI Con Fabio Campoli
programme.desc: Benvenuti a questo nuovo episodio del Circolo dei Buongustai! Cosa bolle in pentola? Oggi il nostro chef Fabio Campoli ci delizierà con tre ricette speciali: cono di stesa, venere nera, e babà al bergamotto. Buona visione a tutti!

programme.title: Il CIRCOLO DEL BUONGUSTAI Con Fabio Campoli
programme.desc: Benvenuti a questo nuovo episodio del Circolo dei Buongustai! Cosa bolle in pentola? Oggi il nostro chef Fabio Campoli ci delizierà con tre ricette speciali: portafoglio di squacquerone, ciliegie e mortadella, riso rosso integrale con pollo e peperoni, diplomatico alle rose. Buona visione a tutti!

programme.title: Il CIRCOLO DEL BUONGUSTAI Con Fabio Campoli
programme.desc: Benvenuti a questo nuovo episodio del Circolo dei Buongustai! Cosa bolle in pentola? Oggi il nostro chef Fabio Campoli ci delizierà con tre ricette speciali: rotolo di riso, prosciutto e melone, risotto alla rucola con kiwi e vongole, e budino di riso. Buona visione a tutti!

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Terza ed ultima puntata della serie. Antonio Fini ed i suoi giudici sono pronti: chi sceglieranno per volare a NEW YORK per il prestigioso festival della danza? Ancora una volta i ragazzi devono convincere l'importante giuria con il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di danza "tecnica Parson" con la maestra Abby Silva.

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Nella prima puntata Antonio Fini ed i suoi giudici incontrano il primo gruppo di ballerini.Per essere selezionati per il prestigioso festival di danza in NEW YORK devono affrontare 3 sfide: presentare il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di danza "tecnica Graham" con il maestro Antonio Fini.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: La puntata di oggi è ricca di contenuti. Ornella Fado incontra Cristina Carrani, esperta in materia immobiliare che aiuterà Ornella a scoprire l'Isola di Capri. Dalla moda alla storia, al cibo e all'arte, Brindiamo! Edizione speciale Capri è l'episodio perfetto per festeggiare i 18 anni di Brindiamo! su NYC LIFE.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova nel laboratorio di Urbani Truffle a New York ed invita i suoi amici chef per preparare insieme delle ricette da gustare durante le festività natalizie. In questa puntata Chef Pino Coladonato, Chef Marcello Russodivito e la giovane pizzaiola Giorgia Caporuscio. In questa edizione di Brindiamo! in my Kitchen ospite speciale la soprano Cristina Fontanelli e John La Barbera, oltre a vari ospiti del mondo dello spettacolo, e della moda. (2016)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova nel laboratorio di Urbani Truffle a New York per la serconda parte di Brindiamo! in my kitchen. I suoi amici chef in questa puntata son lo chef Raffaele Ronca, lo Chef Marco Chirico e il giovane pizzaiolo Ettore Toches. In questa edizione di Brindiamo! in my Kitchen la musica è dal vivo con la soprano Cristina Fontanelli ed il compositore Jhon La Barbera, tra gli ospiti di questa puntata il Fashion designer Domenico Vacca. (2016)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita cinque amici ristoratori durante le feste Natalizie, prima tappa" Angelina's" a Staten Island, poi e` la volta di "Marco Polo" e "Luzzo" a Brooklyn. A Manhattan nell'Upper East side, Ornella visita "83 e mezza". Ultima tappa per ujn buon gelato,"Dolce Gelateria" nel Village. (2013)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado continua il suo giro per incontrare il suoi amici ristoratori durante le festività di capodanno. Visitando a midtown Chef Pino alla "La Masseria", chef Stefano e Franco a " Viceversa", a "PizzArte" incontra il pizzaiolo Roberto ed il proprietario Dario, a Queens visita "Ornella Trattoria" dove incontra Vincenzo e "Trattoria l'Incontro"dove incontra lo chef e proprietario Rocco. (2013/2014)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado organizza un favoloso evento al Michelangelo Hotel di New York City, ospite d' eccezione Mara Martini, ristoratrice e chef stellata veneziana. Tra gli ospiti il biologo e star televisiva Jeff Corwin. In questa puntata Ornella incontra il General Manager Maurizio Benevento che racconta la storia del Michelangelo, unico hotel Italiano nel cuore di Manhattan. Ospite Tony Margiotta autore del libro "Hidden Gems of Italy". (2018)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita la Puglia una delle regioni più pittoresche d'Italia per un viaggio indimenticabile. Dai tipici Trulli di Alberobello, alle grotte di Castellana. Rientrata in America, Ornella incontra chef Pino Coladonato al ristorante "La Masseria", per rivivere alcuni momenti del suo favoloso viaggio pugliese, tramite le ricette di chef Coladonato. (2019)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado festeggia il decimo anniversario di "Enoteca Ristorante" e con Chef Marco Chirico preparano piatti originali, tra cui la pizza tiramisù e gustosi cocktail. Ornella e Marco Incontrano Tom Perrotta a Fort Meat, grossista di carne, dove si rifornisce Enoteca Ristorante. Ornella intervista Giuseppe "Jo" Chirico Patron di Marco Polo storico ristorante di Brooklyn ed Enoteca Ristorante.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado è ancora in Bermuda, e questa volta oltre a preparare alcuni piatti con l' executive chef del "Griffin's Bistro" Pietro Casalicchio. Ornella visita le meraviglie dell'isola via mare.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova a Milano esattamente all'EXPO. Incontra un gruppo di ragazzi della regione Basilicata, che partecipano al progetto "Sano è Lucano", e hanno portato alcuni prodotti tipici della regione Basilicata, che Ornella utilizza per cucinare alcune ricette con Jasmin sulla barca, con Antonio alla libreria Mondadori di Milano, con Nicolò a "Lady Bu Bistrò", e con Fabio Pisani al ristorante stellato di Aimo e Nadia.(2015)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova in una delle città più belle al mondo, Venezia, e visita il "Centurion Palace", dove incontra lo chef veneziano Massimo Livan al ristorante "Antinoo's Lounge". Con chef Massimo, Ornella prepara dei piatti ispirati ai dipinti d' arte moderna. Durante la visita al "Centurion Palace" incontra il General Manager Paolo Morra, e davanti ad un cocktail tutto veneziano Paolo racconta la storia di questo storico palazzo. (2015)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova in Florida ospite di un eccezionale evento organizzato da Ursula Avella Presidente di "Great Culinary Minds". L 'evento si è svolto al ristorante "Valentino Cucina Italiana". Ospite di Ornella è il talentuoso chef Mauro Uliassi, all'epoca 2 stelle Michelin, ora 3. programme.title: My Talented Friends Season 1
programme.desc: Ornella Fado, passa una giornata a New York con il suo amico Geniale, il Maestro Antonio Ciacca, e tra una chiacchierata a Lincoln Center ed una passeggiata a Central Park, arrivano al prestigiosto Pier Hotel dove il Maestro Ciacca si esibisce regolarmente. in questo episodio di "MY TALENTED FRIENDS" scoprirete la storia di successo del Maestro Ciacca in un pccolo documentario MY JAZZ LIFE.

programme.title: My Talented Friends Season 1
programme.desc: Ornella Fado introduce il suo amico Geniale Julian Gargiulo, un talentuosissimo compositore e pianista on uno spiccato senso dell'umore, Julian e` il protagnosita e regista di un documentario girato al Carnegie Hall di New York, durante una competizione ideada dal maestro Gargiiulo.

programme.title: Eccellenze Italiane con Piero Muscari intervista a Heinz Beck
programme.desc: Piero Muscari intervista Heinz Beck, chef stellato del ristorante "La Pergola" di Roma. Heinz racconta l'inizio della sua carriera e spiega la sua visione della cucina italiana.

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Continuano le audizioni di Antonio Fini e dei suoi giudici per selezionare i migliori danzatori da invitare al prestigioso festival di danza in NEW YORK. I ragazzi affrontano le tre sfide previste: portare il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di Hip hop con Mirco Giordano e Marcello Gargarelli.

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Terza ed ultima puntata della serie. Antonio Fini ed i suoi giudici sono pronti: chi sceglieranno per volare a NEW YORK per il prestigioso festival della danza? Ancora una volta i ragazzi devono convincere l'importante giuria con il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di danza "tecnica Parson" con la maestra Abby Silva.

programme.title: Il CIRCOLO DEL BUONGUSTAI Con Fabio Campoli
programme.desc: Benvenuti a questo nuovo episodio del Circolo dei Buongustai! Cosa bolle in pentola? Oggi il nostro chef Fabio Campoli ci delizierà con tre ricette speciali: cono di stesa, venere nera, e babà al bergamotto. Buona visione a tutti!

programme.title: My Talented Friends Season 1
programme.desc: Ornella Fado, passa una giornata a New York con il suo amico Geniale, il Maestro Antonio Ciacca, e tra una chiacchierata a Lincoln Center ed una passeggiata a Central Park, arrivano al prestigiosto Pier Hotel dove il Maestro Ciacca si esibisce regolarmente. in questo episodio di "MY TALENTED FRIENDS" scoprirete la storia di successo del Maestro Ciacca in un pccolo documentario MY JAZZ LIFE.

programme.title: My Talented Friends Season 1
programme.desc: Ornella Fado introduce il suo amico Geniale Julian Gargiulo, un talentuosissimo compositore e pianista on uno spiccato senso dell'umore, Julian e` il protagnosita e regista di un documentario girato al Carnegie Hall di New York, durante una competizione ideada dal maestro Gargiiulo.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita cinque amici ristoratori durante le feste Natalizie, prima tappa" Angelina's" a Staten Island, poi e` la volta di "Marco Polo" e "Luzzo" a Brooklyn. A Manhattan nell'Upper East side, Ornella visita "83 e mezza". Ultima tappa per ujn buon gelato,"Dolce Gelateria" nel Village. (2013)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado si trova in Piemonte per scorpire il territorio e visitare alcuni ristoranti stellati. In questa puntata Ornella visita la Reggia di Venaria, dove il Re del ristorante "Dolce Stil Novo", chef Alfredo Russo prepara nella spaziosa e super moderna cucina delle prelibatezze tipiche piemontesi. Ornella visita anche la scuola di restauro e parla con la responsabile della scuola Dr.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita Washington DC e va a scoprire un ristorante proprio a due passi dalla Casa Bianca, il ristorante si chiama "Luigino", il proprietario e chef è Carmine Marzano. Chef Marzano prepara delle ricette tipiche piemontesi. Ospite della trasmissione la bellissima Adrianna Sgarlata Miss Virginia 2006. (2006)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita chef Cesare Casella nel suo ristorante nel Village "Maremma" per preparare alcune delle sue ricette preferite. Con Cesare Ornella visita upstate un allevamento di maiali e mucche Chianine. Cesare Casella oltre ad essere un bravissimo chef è anche uno stimatissimo insegnate, è infatti il Dean del programma di cucina italiana all' "International Culinary Center" a Soho ed Ornella è andata a trovarlo con le telecamere di Brindiamo!.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita il ristorante "Il Circo" nel cuore di Manhattan, dove conosce la signora Egidiana autrice di diversi libri di cucina. Dopo aver preprato alcune specialità del ristorante, Ornella visita il Re della ristorazione francese al ristornate Le Cirque. Il Signore Mauro Maccioni in una intervsita racconta ad Ornella la sua favolosa carriera nella ristorazione.(2007)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita il ristorante toscano "Pepolino" dove prepara delle saporite ricette con lo chef Patrizio, per chiudere in "Dolcezza e Bellezza" Enzo prepara una delle cheese cake piu` famose di New York.(2007).

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: La puntata di oggi è ricca di contenuti. Ornella Fado incontra Cristina Carrani, esperta in materia immobiliare che aiuterà Ornella a scoprire l'Isola di Capri. Dalla moda alla storia, al cibo e all'arte, Brindiamo! Edizione speciale Capri è l'episodio perfetto per festeggiare i 18 anni di Brindiamo! su NYC LIFE.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita Gente, dove incontra Jay Mitchel un americano appassionato di Italia al punto di aprire un suo ristorante in america per far apprezzare il cibo Italiano ad i suoi clienti.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita il ristorante Barolo, nel cuore di Soho ed incontra il proprietario Paolo Secondo, che oltre a preparare una squsita focaccia Genovese, racconta la sua storia di giovane imprenditore italiano a New York.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage.Ornella Fado, visita il ristorante stellato Cascinale Novo, dove incontra chef Walter Ferreto e preparano delle tipiche ricette Piemontesi. Ornella inoltre visitare la casa del Trifolao di Natale Romagnolo per una caccia al tartufo Bianco.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita una delle pizzerie piu` autentiche di New York,con uno dei 5 forni a legna più antichi della città`. "Luzzo" Pizzeria si trova a due passi dal quartiere trendy, il Village. Con Michele Iuliano, pizzaiolo napoletano di grande esperienza, Ornella prepara delle deliziose pizze, alcune tradizionali come la classica margherita ed alcune con un twist. Ospite della puntata il giovane talento Italiano il tenore Luciamo La Monarca.(2008)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita uno dei ristoranti più belli d'Europa, "Don Alfonso 1890" dove incontra la famiglia Iaccarino. Oltre a preparare le ricette nella bellissima cucina con chef Ernesto Iaccarino, Ornella intervista Livia Iaccarino, la prima sommelier donna in Italia, la signora Iaccarino racconta la bellissima storia della famiglia di Don Alfonso, che ha fatto dell' ospitalità la sua stroria.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita due ristoranti di eccellenza, San Pietro e Masseria. Al San Pietro Ornella incontra i fratelli Bruno, con lo chef Antonio prepara delle ricette gustose del classico menù del ristorante, mentre Gerardo racconta la storia del rstorante ed il successo dei loro ristoranti. Da Masseria Ornella incontra lo Chef e Patron Pino Coladonato, e preparano delle ricette tipiche pugliesi.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita" Via Oreto", un ristorante dal cuore siciliano. Antony prepara le ricette della nonna e della mamma. Accanto la nonna a visionare tutto. In questo episodio Ornella intervsita un esperto del vino siciliano Pietro Cavallo, e parlano dell'importanza di abbinare il giusto vino ad ogni piatto.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova nel laboratorio di Urbani Truffle a New York ed invita i suoi amici chef per preparare insieme delle ricette da gustare durante le festività natalizie. In questa puntata Chef Pino Coladonato, Chef Marcello Russodivito e la giovane pizzaiola Giorgia Caporuscio. In questa edizione di Brindiamo! in my Kitchen ospite speciale la soprano Cristina Fontanelli e John La Barbera, oltre a vari ospiti del mondo dello spettacolo, e della moda. (2016)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova nel laboratorio di Urbani Truffle a New York per la serconda parte di Brindiamo! in my kitchen. I suoi amici chef in questa puntata son lo chef Raffaele Ronca, lo Chef Marco Chirico e il giovane pizzaiolo Ettore Toches. In questa edizione di Brindiamo! in my Kitchen la musica è dal vivo con la soprano Cristina Fontanelli ed il compositore Jhon La Barbera, tra gli ospiti di questa puntata il Fashion designer Domenico Vacca. (2016)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita cinque amici ristoratori durante le feste Natalizie, prima tappa" Angelina's" a Staten Island, poi e` la volta di "Marco Polo" e "Luzzo" a Brooklyn. A Manhattan nell'Upper East side, Ornella visita "83 e mezza". Ultima tappa per ujn buon gelato,"Dolce Gelateria" nel Village. (2013)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado continua il suo giro per incontrare il suoi amici ristoratori durante le festività di capodanno. Visitando a midtown Chef Pino alla "La Masseria", chef Stefano e Franco a " Viceversa", a "PizzArte" incontra il pizzaiolo Roberto ed il proprietario Dario, a Queens visita "Ornella Trattoria" dove incontra Vincenzo e "Trattoria l'Incontro"dove incontra lo chef e proprietario Rocco. (2013/2014)

programme.title: Eccellenze Italiane con Piero Muscari intervista a Heinz Beck
programme.desc: Piero Muscari intervista Alberto Biasi, famoso artista italiano. Alberto racconta delle esperienze della sua infanzia e come queste hanno influenzato le sue opere e la sua arte.

programme.title: Eccellenze Italiane con Piero Muscari intervista a Heinz Beck
programme.desc: Piero Muscari intervista Danilo Iervolino, Presidente e Fondatore di UniPegaso. Danilo racconta la storia della sua università telematica che unisce tecnologia e arte.

programme.title: My Talented Friends Season 1
programme.desc: Ornella Fado introuce il suo amico Geniale Marco Napoli, attore e regista televisivo e cinematografico. Il documentario di oggi vede come protagonista una giovane artista catanese Roberta Finocchiaro "Save lives with the Rhytm.

programme.title: My Talented Friends Season 1
programme.desc: Ornella Fado presenta il lavoro artistico della sua amica Geniale,Paola Sinisgalli fondatrice della "Creative Shakes" il lavoro artistico di oggi e` un corto che vede Paola nei panni di regista.

programme.title: Il CIRCOLO DEL BUONGUSTAI Con Fabio Campoli
programme.desc: Benvenuti a questo nuovo episodio del Circolo dei Buongustai! Cosa bolle in pentola? Oggi il nostro chef Fabio Campoli ci delizierà con tre ricette speciali: portafoglio di squacquerone, ciliegie e mortadella, riso rosso integrale con pollo e peperoni, diplomatico alle rose. Buona visione a tutti!

programme.title: Il CIRCOLO DEL BUONGUSTAI Con Fabio Campoli
programme.desc: Benvenuti a questo nuovo episodio del Circolo dei Buongustai! Cosa bolle in pentola? Oggi il nostro chef Fabio Campoli ci delizierà con tre ricette speciali: rotolo di riso, prosciutto e melone, risotto alla rucola con kiwi e vongole, e budino di riso. Buona visione a tutti!

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Nella prima puntata Antonio Fini ed i suoi giudici incontrano il primo gruppo di ballerini.Per essere selezionati per il prestigioso festival di danza in NEW YORK devono affrontare 3 sfide: presentare il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di danza "tecnica Graham" con il maestro Antonio Fini.

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Continuano le audizioni di Antonio Fini e dei suoi giudici per selezionare i migliori danzatori da invitare al prestigioso festival di danza in NEW YORK. I ragazzi affrontano le tre sfide previste: portare il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di Hip hop con Mirco Giordano e Marcello Gargarelli.

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Terza ed ultima puntata della serie. Antonio Fini ed i suoi giudici sono pronti: chi sceglieranno per volare a NEW YORK per il prestigioso festival della danza? Ancora una volta i ragazzi devono convincere l'importante giuria con il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di danza "tecnica Parson" con la maestra Abby Silva.

A Manhattan nell'Upper East side, Ornella visita "83 e mezza". Ultima tappa per ujn buon gelato,"Dolce Gelateria" nel Village. (2013)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
